Publisher name shown in Microsoft Sentinel.
Resource name of the BitSight full connector definition.

connectorUiConfig.title: BitSight (Full Integration, CCF)
connectorUiConfig.descriptionMarkdown:
BitSight connector built on **Microsoft Sentinel Codeless Connector Framework (CCF)**.

This package expands the pilot into the **full integration scope** of the deprecated Function-based connector:

- Portfolio Companies
- Company Details
- Company Rating Details
- Alerts
- Graph
- Diligence Historical Statistics
- Diligence Statistics
- Industrial Statistics
- Observation Statistics
- Findings
- Findings Summary
- Breaches

The connection template creates the custom tables, one DCR, one DCE (optional), and multiple `RestApiPoller` connections under a single BitSight connector definition.

sampleQueries.query: BitsightAlerts_data_CL | sort by TimeGenerated desc | take 10
BitsightFindings_data_CL | sort by TimeGenerated desc | take 10
BitsightBreaches_data_CL | sort by TimeGenerated desc | take 10
BitsightCompany_details_CL | sort by TimeGenerated desc | take 10
BitsightPortfolio_Companies_CL | sort by TimeGenerated desc | take 10

dataTypes.name: BitsightPortfolio_Companies_CL
dataTypes.lastDataReceivedQuery: BitsightPortfolio_Companies_CL | summarize Time = max(TimeGenerated) | where isnotempty(Time)

resourceProvider.permissionsDisplayText: Read and write permissions are required.

customs.name: BitSight API token
customs.description: A valid BitSight API token is required.

customs.name: Template Spec deployment permissions
customs.description: The operator must be allowed to deploy template specs, tables, data collection endpoints, data collection rules, and SecurityInsights data connectors.

customs.name: BitSight endpoint validation
customs.description: The connection template ships with placeholders and parameterized defaults for endpoint, response, and paging settings. Validate the exact BitSight URLs and paging model before production use.

instructionSteps.title: Connect BitSight full integration to Microsoft Sentinel
instructionSteps.description: Provide the BitSight API token and click Connect. Update the template-spec parameter file with the exact BitSight endpoint URLs and paging settings before production deployment.
